notes: Initial eval pass — prompts only, no assertions. Add per-case assertions after the first iteration of grading. Inputs reference fixture sites that already have HTML + screenshots produced by prior liberate runs.

cases.intent: A rich blog post with a hero image, multiple body sections, an inline pull-quote, and a CTA at the end. Verifies the skill can map a long-form article to a mix of wp:cover, wp:heading, wp:paragraph, wp:quote, and wp:buttons without leaning on wp:html.

An about/marketing page with a hero, a 3-column feature grid, a testimonials row, and a footer CTA. Verifies the skill picks wp:cover for the hero, wp:columns (3) for the features, wp:quote for testimonials, and wp:buttons centered for the footer CTA.

A product page with a primary product image, a 4-column gallery of detail shots, structured product copy, and a sticky-on-mobile add-to-cart row. Verifies wp:image for the hero, wp:gallery (4 columns) for the detail strip, and wp:buttons for the CTA. Add-to-cart specifics live in the theme's single-product template, not in post_content — the skill should not try to reproduce price/variant UI.
A page consisting of an intro paragraph followed by a FAQ accordion (8-12 question/answer pairs). Verifies wp:details usage and that the skill does not flatten the accordion into raw paragraphs.

Landing page with 5+ distinct full-bleed sections of alternating surface treatments (raised card, accent banner, inverse footer-band). Verifies the skill correctly maps surface alternation to backgroundColor slugs and uses align:full consistently.

A category/collection page rendered as a 12-product grid with a small intro paragraph above the grid. Verifies the skill recognizes that the product grid itself belongs in the theme template (a query loop block), NOT in post_content — the skill should emit only the intro paragraph + a heading, leaving the listing to the theme.
